notes: Chinese national standards administration. Publishes the GB (mandatory) and GB/T (recommended) standards series. SAC and the State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) jointly operate the standards portals std.samr.gov.cn and openstd.samr.gov.cn. Cybersecurity standards under TC260 (covered at secid:control/cn/org/tc260.json) are the most-cited subset; SAC is the broader parent for non-cyber-specific national standards. License posture: mostly paywalled with selective free access for mandatory GB standards.

match_nodes.description: GB/T 22080 — Chinese national edition of ISO/IEC 27001

data.official_name: GB/T 22080 - Information technology — Security techniques — Information security management systems — Requirements
data.notes: Chinese national edition of ISO/IEC 27001. Technical content tracks the ISO master; cross-reference secid:control/iso.org/27001.

match_nodes.description: GB/T 22239 — Information Security Technology — Baseline for Classified Protection of Cybersecurity (MLPS 2.0)

data.official_name: GB/T 22239 - Information Security Technology — Baseline for Classified Protection of Cybersecurity
data.notes: The control baseline underlying China's Multi-Level Protection Scheme (MLPS 2.0). Mandatory technical baseline for systems within China's classified-protection regime. Distinct from ISO/IEC 27002; a Chinese-original control framework.
